description: India Book (IB) I, 38. List of donors of wheat and/or cash for the poor. Dated: Av 1489 Seleucid = July/August 1178 CE. The occasion was probably the fast of the 9th of Av. Location: Fustat. One of the donors is the son of Bū l-Riḍā Ibn al-Lebdī (the father, Abū l-Riḍā, appears in Yevr.-Arab. I 1700.6 (PGPID 9591)). (Information from Goitein's attached notes.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
